entries.text: <e97432>High-value</> crops can be sold for many Versatile Coins, but planting them <ff0000>grants no EXP</>. Continue? (The Homestead merchant buys high-value crops at a premium, but <ff0000>weekly purchases are limited</>, so mind how many you plant.)
entries.zh_text: <e97432>高售价</>作物可以卖出高额百工币，但种植<ff0000>无法获得经验</>，是否继续？（居所商人高倍收购高售价作物，但<ff0000>每周限次数</>，注意种植数量哦）

entries.text:
Learn the combo for casting Fate Breaker.
After casting any Flow Skill, you can cast an additional skill. Once the additional skill hits, the next basic attack is enhanced into Fate Breaker.
entries.zh_text:
学习施放破命击的连招。
施放任意流技后，可再施放一次追加技。追加技命中后，下一次普攻强化为破命击。

Sequence Placeholder:
Beiwang wakes as if from a dream, sits up, and upon locking eyes with the protagonist, transforms into the protagonist's likeness and nods.
[Beiwang] It is time for you to wake up.
Beiwang transforms into a dream butterfly and vanishes as a Kun flies overhead.
[Mysterious Voice] (Zhuang Zhou) I dream of the butterfly, the butterfly dreams of me. Knowing me is knowing myself; all things are me. Journey to the north.
[Protagonist] Meng Yongzhi's voice? A Kun? Is this... a dreamscape?
Sequence End
entries.zh_text:
seq占位：
北望如梦初醒，从地上坐起来，与主角对视时，化为主角的样子，点点头。
【北望】你该醒来了。
北望化为梦蝶消失，天上鲲飞过。
【神秘声音】（庄周）我梦蝴蝶，蝴蝶梦我，同我知我，万物皆我，往北方前行吧。
【主角】孟永之的声音？鲲？这就是……幻梦奇景么……
seq结束

Transition Placeholder: When the Crimson Cub is weak, Yao calls the protagonist to focus fire to steal the Red Buff, while he uses Smite.
The moment the Crimson Cub falls, Yao strikes a cool pose for stealing the Red Buff, only to find it went to the protagonist.
[Dongfang Yao] What?
[Cup] (Dongfang Yao wanted to use Smite to steal Gui Die's Red Buff, but he used it too early! It was eventually taken by a teammate!)
Just then, the bottom second tower and middle first tower light up with blue and red pillars.
[Cup] (The situation on the field is changing in an instant! The battle between the two teams on the other side has also settled!)
[Protagonist] (The ownership of the middle first tower... has changed. What happened?)
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：在猩红幼兽虚弱之时，曜招呼主角集火抢红，自己释放惩戒。
在猩红幼兽倒下的一刻，曜摆出抢到红的帅气Pose，结果却发现红到了主角身上。
【东方曜】什么？
【杯子】（东方曜想用惩戒抢圭蝶的红，结果放早了！最后被队友收下！）
就在此时，下二塔、中一塔，接连亮起蓝色和红色的光柱。
【杯子】（场上局势瞬息万变！两支队伍在另一边的较量也尘埃落定了！）
【主角】（中一塔的归属……变了。发生什么事了？）

entries.text:
A noble and elegant bird with a slender build. The blue-purple icy feathers on its eyelashes resemble the dark, distant mountains, giving it an air of unreachability.

Unlike the Cloud-Unseen, the Distant-Mountain-Dark does not like to be close to humans. When it encounters visitors, it flies away after a brief glance, as if expressing its dissatisfaction at being disturbed. They are often used as a metaphor for those who are highly focused.
entries.zh_text:
高贵优雅的鸟类，身姿纤长。
睫毛上蓝紫色的冰洁长羽，如远山含黛，让人感觉高不可攀。

与云不见不同的是，远山黛不喜亲近人类。
遇见前来探访的人也是匆匆一瞥便飞走，像是诉说对扰鹤清净的不满。
它们也时常被当做专注之人的代称。

entries.text:
"Dark wings cry low, disaster looms; shadows sweep through gold and silver light."

Black feathers drift down, and calamity follows. This is the first impression people have of Litian: ominous, dangerous... Pair after pair of uneasy eyes watch him, but Litian never cares.
To Litian, only two things matter: first, flashy moves; second, shiny gold rings. Everything else is trivial and unworthy of mention.

Time long past is buried beneath the yellow sand. Now, Litian works as a treasure hunter, his mission to acquire more gold rings.
Wherever there are gold rings or treasures, Litian will find his way there.
And for the right price, his martial arts and the hook-swords in his hands can be yours to command.
entries.zh_text:
“玄翅低啼祸未央，暗影偏掠金银光。”

墨色羽毛飘落，厄难随之而来。人们看见戾天的第一印象大抵都是如此，不详，危险……一双双满怀不安的眼神打量着他，戾天却从不在意。
对戾天而言，唯有两件重要事物，其一，是帅气的招式，其二，便是亮闪闪的环金。其余皆为俗物，无需称道。

曾经的时光已然被掩埋于黄沙之下，如今的戾天以寻宝为职，以搞到更多环金为使命。
无论何处，有环金，有宝贝，戾天便可寻味而至。
而只需加钱，这一身武艺，手中钩剑，亦可为你所用。

entries.text:
The Snow-Velvet Fox is a gem-like blue all over, except for its face and chest, where the fur is as white as snow, making it as elegant and noble as a spirit of the frozen world. They are exceptionally agile and flee quickly if anyone approaches, making them difficult to get close to.

According to hunter records, the Snow-Velvet Fox seems to be able to sense when a blizzard is ending. During storms, they blend into the snow, leaving only two lines of fine footprints. These tracks have saved countless creatures lost in the blizzard.
entries.zh_text:
雪绒狐通身都是宝石般的蓝色。
唯有面部和胸口绒毛纯白如雪，仿佛是冰雪世界的精灵般优雅高贵。
它们灵敏异常，寻常人一旦靠近便会迅速逃离，为人所难以靠近。

据游猎家记载，雪绒狐似乎可以感应暴雪的结束。
在风暴中它们几乎与雪景融为一体，唯独留下两行细密的脚印。
这两行脚印救助过无数迷失在暴风雪中的生灵。

entries.text:
A cautious and timid deer species, mostly living in mountainous areas.
Compared to other deer, the antlers of the male Pillow-Wind Deer are more fragile.
Explorers believe they are often threatened by Scorching Fluff, and their large antlers are useless against it, actually hindering their escape speed.
Once a predator grabs a Pillow-Wind Deer's antlers, they will break them off without hesitation to escape.

Antlers are seen as a symbol of dignity and strength.
But compared to life, these are worth nothing.
entries.zh_text:
谨慎胆小的鹿种，多生活于山区。
相比较其他鹿种，雄性枕风鹿的角则更加脆弱。
游猎家认为它们常受灼绒威胁，硕大的鹿角对灼绒毫无作用，反倒会影响逃跑的速度。
捕食者一旦抓住枕风鹿的角，它们会毫不犹豫地断角逃生。

鹿的角被视作尊严与力量的象征。
不过比起生命，这些都不值一提。

entries.text:
The Bone-Leaf Fox in the dreamscape glows with a deep blue light. It has willow-leaf-shaped silver patterns on its back and unique indigo eyes.
Influenced by the dream, these creatures have become more mysterious and agile, making it extremely difficult to see them clearly.

Few who have seen a Bone-Leaf Fox say they possess a pair of soulful eyes.
Because of this, in storytellers' tales, the Bone-Leaf Fox often appears in sorrowful and sentimental stories.
entries.zh_text:
梦境中的骨叶狐，全身泛着深蓝色的幽光。
背上长着柳叶状的银色纹路，眼睛呈奇特的靛蓝色。
在梦境的影响下这种生物变得更加神秘且机敏，轻易极难看清它们的全貌。

为数不多见过骨叶狐的人说，它们拥有着一双灵性的双眼。
也因此，在说书人的那些段子中，骨叶狐往往出现在哀婉多情的故事里。

entries.text:
Deer are widely distributed throughout Jixia, known for their light and elegant posture.
Female Dust Deer are smaller, with snow-white necks and thick white fluff on their chests.
They live in mixed-gender groups with clear divisions of labor.

The fur on their backs is light brown, helping them blend into their environment, which is how they got the name "Dust Deer."
They are often found in lush, scenic areas with abundant vegetation.
Because of this, they are often seen in legends as a sign of harvest and good fortune.
entries.zh_text:
广泛分布在稷下各处的鹿，体态轻盈优雅。
雌性尘鹿体格较小，脖颈雪白，胸口处长有茂盛的白色绒毛。
雌雄一同生活，分工明确。

它们背部的绒毛呈浅棕色，善于在环境中隐藏自己，也由此得名尘鹿。
山清水秀、植被丰茂之处常有尘鹿出没。
因此它在传说中往往预示着丰收和幸运。

entries.text:
A rabbit with fur as translucent as jade.
In the dark, people often mistake it for a large gemstone, so when it moves, it often startles students entering the dream.
Dream Rabbits often appear in dreams; they are friendly and rumored to help humans, though they occasionally play tricks on the greedy.

Legend has it that some have seen them gather together, their light illuminating the entire sky.
However, to this day, this remains just a legend.
entries.zh_text:
毛色如同玉石般剔透的兔子。
黑暗中人们总会把它错认成大块的宝石，因此当它动起来，总会惊吓到入梦的学子。
旖梦兔时常出现在梦境之中，它们性格友善，传言中时常帮助人类，但偶尔也会捉弄一下贪心的家伙。

传闻中，曾有人见过它们聚集在一起，散发出的光芒照亮了整片天幕。
不过时至今日，这依旧只是传说。

entries.text:
The fur on the Gilded Fox's neck displays flower-like patterns. These mysterious and elegant markings are considered a symbol of luxury, making the Gilded Fox highly prized by noble families.

Records state that "the Gilded Fox's cry is a thousand-fold melody," as their calls are exceptionally melodious. They only cry out nine times in their lives for unknown reasons, and each cry is unique. Countless members of the Gongyu family have spent their entire lives trying to capture these sounds.
entries.zh_text:
鎏纹狐后颈的绒毛，显示出花朵般的纹路。
这花纹神秘高雅，被视作是华贵的象征，鎏纹狐也因此被许多世家所推崇。

据记载“鎏狐一声千转绝”，鎏纹狐叫声婉转动听。
它们一生只长鸣九次，原因不明，但次次不同。
为了捕捉它们的声音，无数宫羽家付出了毕生的时光。

entries.text:
Nightmare-Spotted Deer are distributed throughout the Dream Realm. Due to the influence of dream energy, their fur has turned a dark, psychedelic purple, dotted with many light-colored spots. The males grow antlers and have manes on their chests. Their deep, dream-like color has made them mysterious and eerie figures in folklore.

Their coat color darkens with age. It is rumored that the darkest Nightmare-Spotted Deer possesses special power. Many who have been trapped in nightmares have claimed that it was this deer that guided them to wake up.
entries.zh_text:
魇斑鹿分布在整个梦境区域之中。
由于梦能的影响，它们的皮毛变成了幽暗迷幻得紫色，同时点缀着许多浅色斑点。
雄性魇斑鹿长角，前胸覆盖着鬃毛。
梦境般幽深的颜色让它们在民间传说中成为神秘诡谲的存在。

它们的毛色会随着年龄增长越变越深。
传言颜色最深的那一只魇斑鹿，拥有着特殊的力量。
许多困于噩梦的人，都曾表示自己正是受到它的指引才得以从噩梦中醒来。

entries.text:
Nightmare-Spotted Deer are distributed throughout the Dream Realm. Due to the influence of dream energy, their fur has turned a dark, psychedelic purple, dotted with many light-colored spots. The does have snow-white necks and no antlers, replaced instead by a patch of pink fluff.

Ancient Jixia divination suggests that Nightmare-Spotted Deer feed on human dreams: the stags consume deep dreams, while the does consume shallow ones. Encountering both a stag and a doe in a dream may mean that your dreams are about to fall through.
entries.zh_text:
魇斑鹿分布在整个梦境区域之中。
由于梦能的影响，它们的皮毛变成了幽暗迷幻得紫色，同时点缀着许多浅色斑点。
雌鹿的脖颈雪白，头顶上没有角，取而代之的，是一抹粉色绒毛。

稷下的古老占卜学中认为，魇斑鹿以人类的梦为食，雄鹿吞食深层梦境，雌鹿吞食浅层梦境。
如果在梦中同时遇到雌雄两头鹿，可能意味着梦想将要落空。

entries.text:
A Master doll holding a ruler, intricately carved from cloud root, with a smooth and polished finish.

This piece is inspired by Master's image while guiding students in the training grounds. During every Guxie Mountain trial, Master would spar with the martial arts students alone. His ruler would touch them like a dancing dragon, guiding their martial techniques.

When this item first hit the shelves at Baihui Market, sales were dismal. Later, a martial arts student on a whim brought the doll with him to an exam, and he passed subjects he had repeatedly failed. Since then, rumors spread through the academy that the doll brings good luck for exams, and it became a bestseller overnight.
entries.zh_text:
手持戒尺的老夫子玩偶，由云根精雕细琢而成，表面光滑润泽。
       
此作品灵感来源于夫子老师在试炼场指点学生的形象。每逢姑射山试炼，老夫子独自一人与众武道学生切磋。戒尺如游龙般在学生身上轻触，指点他们武道招式。
       
此物刚在百汇坊上架时，销量十分惨淡。后来有位武道学生在考试时，突发奇想将此玩偶带在身上，屡次不及格的科目竟顺利通关。于是，学院流传起了该玩偶能为考试带来好运，一时间销售火爆。

entries.text: Deconstruct the puzzles of the trials and craft clever guides. Share your practical experience like a lighthouse on the sea, guiding newcomers as they ride the waves!
entries.zh_text: 拆解闯关迷局，巧撰攻略锦囊。分享实战心得，如海上明灯，指引萌新踏浪！

entries.text: Effect: Increases Pierce Resistance by <Gold_Basic>15%</> for <Gold_Basic>20</> minutes.
entries.zh_text: 效果：贯元素抗性提升<Gold_Basic>15%</>，持续<Gold_Basic>20</>分钟。

entries.text: Lightweight gauntlets worn by the people of the Singing Sands. The faint glow of fireflies lights the long road home for the wanderer.
entries.zh_text:
鸣沙之民们的轻薄手甲。
微弱的萤火之光照亮游子的归乡长路。

entries.text: A metal crown surrounded by fireflies. In the oasis, fireflies watch over travelers who have yet to return home. Fireflies are the incarnations of old friends, and stars upon the earth.
entries.zh_text:
萤火围绕着的金属头冠。在绿洲中，萤火守候着未归乡的旅人。
萤火是故人的化身，也是地上的星星。

entries.text: A fresh green robe favored by the people of the Singing Sands. Its emerald color is like an oasis stretching across the endless yellow sands. Traveling through mountains and rivers, the stars shine in the sky.
entries.zh_text:
鸣沙之民们喜爱的新绿色长袍。绿宝石一般的颜色，如同横亘在无垠黄沙中的绿洲。
远游山川，星河在天。

entries.text: A wooden sword carved from a branch of the Ancestral Mulberry, holding a seed of hope waiting to sprout. The Ancestral Mulberry will always protect the children of Mingsha.
entries.zh_text:
以祖桑枝桠雕刻而成的木剑，其中蕴含的希望之种等待着发芽。
祖桑会永远庇佑鸣沙之子。

entries.text: The leather shoes that have traveled across the nations of the Cloud Realm, having endured the endless blowing sands with their owner, finally stepped into that endless world of paintings. The homeland they stepped back onto has become ruins of sand.
entries.zh_text:
踏遍云中诸国的皮鞋，与其主人一起经受过无尽黄沙的吹拂，最终踏入那无尽的画中世界。
再次踏上的故土，已成为黄沙残垣。

entries.text: Light, simple shorts in a cloud-white hue, accented with golden patterns. Very versatile.
entries.zh_text: 用料轻薄的短裤，云白素雅，点缀有金色花纹，十分百搭。

entries.text:
1. Purchase Radish Blind Boxes to randomly obtain one of 8 radish-themed outfits. You can purchase 1 or 6 boxes at a time.
2. The Radish Blind Box collection includes 2 hidden outfits and 6 basic outfits. The hidden outfits are 'Radish King' and 'Radish Queen'. The basic outfits are 'Radish Immortal', 'Radish Bandit', 'Radish Fresh', 'Radish Knight', 'Radish Poet', and 'Radish Harvest'.
3. Blind boxes open automatically upon purchase. When obtaining basic or hidden outfits, you will prioritize receiving ones you do not yet own. Once you have collected all basic outfits, any further basic outfits obtained will be automatically converted into 20 'Zhaoyun Coins: Radish'. Once you have collected all hidden outfits, you will only receive basic outfits from subsequent purchases; you cannot obtain duplicate hidden outfits.
4. After accumulating enough 'Zhaoyun Coins: Radish', you can use them to redeem hidden outfits. If you obtain a hidden outfit via a blind box after already redeeming it, it will be automatically converted into 240 'Zhaoyun Coins: Radish'.
5. 'Zhaoyun Coins: Radish' will be reclaimed by the system after the Radish Blind Box event ends. Please note the sale period and redeem your rewards in time.
6. During the Radish Blind Box event, collect any two radish-themed outfits to claim the 'Radish Gaze' headwear.

Probability:
Hidden: 1.5%
Basic: 98.5%
entries.zh_text:
1. 购买萝卜卜盲盒可随机从8款萝卜主题时装中获取1款，1次可购买1盒或6盒。
2. 萝卜卜盲盒中的时装包含2款隐藏款与6款基础款。其中萝国王、萝王后为隐藏款，萝半仙儿、萝大盗、萝清新、萝侠客、萝诗书、萝丰收为基础款。
3. 购买盲盒后会自动开启，获得基础款或隐藏款时优先获取其中未拥有的款式。购买盲盒获得全部基础款后，继续购买盲盒获得基础款时将会自动转化为20个照运金币·萝卜。购买盲盒获得全部隐藏款后，继续购买盲盒只可获得基础款，无法重复获取隐藏款。
4. 累计获取足够数量的照运金币·萝卜后，也可通过消耗照运金币·萝卜兑换隐藏款，若在兑换隐藏款后再次通过购买盲盒获取相同款式，则自动转化为240个照运金币·萝卜。
5.照运金币·萝卜在萝卜卜盲盒下架后会被系统回收，请注意盲盒售卖时间并及时兑换奖励。
6. 萝卜卜盲盒上架期间，收集任意两款萝卜卜时装，即可领取萝之凝视头饰。

概率说明：
隐藏款：1.5%
基础款：98.5%

entries.text: The Pearl Tree has heard countless wishes and witnessed your meeting with Yunyue. Yunyue slowly explains the true meaning of the tree: plants will eventually wither, and wishes may be forgotten, but the person in one's heart will never fade with time. Her words fall upon your heart like wind through branches, leaving you with a sense of déjà vu...

The breeze sends the birds home, the babbling stream draped in silver gauze.
The River Spirit waits behind the stone tablet, craving a game of tag.
The little River Spirits leap and sing, their moving melody light and melodious.
<69D0FF>Under the silver moon</>, the River Spirits dance together, bestowing blessings upon those who meet.

entries.text:
The camera pans up to the commentary booth.
[Shi Ren] The moment of truth is finally here!
Scene: Dongfang Jing faces five opponents alone, fighting to break through.
[Kuai Zui] Just now, Dongfang Jing held off all five members of the Guidie team single-handedly, securing an advantage for his teammates.
Scene: The protagonist collects the final mark as Xi Shi applauds nearby.
[Kuai Zui] The Star Team is the first to collect all three marks and is now heading for the Crystal.
Scene: The Guidie team rushes desperately, arriving at the Crystal ahead of time.
[Kuai Zui] However, the Guidie team isn't giving up yet; they are waiting for them at the Crystal.
[Shi Ren] The champion's name will soon be revealed! Let's return to the arena and cheer for the players you support!
Cut back to the arena: The five members of the Star Team are at the mid-lane high ground, advancing toward the Crystal.
entries.zh_text:
镜头拉高，衔接至解说席。
【石任】决战时刻终于要来了！
画面：东方曜一个人迎战五人，奋力突围。
【蒯最】刚才，东方曜以一人之力，迎战圭蝶队五人，为队友赢得先机。
画面：主角拿到最后一枚印记，西施在旁鼓掌。
【蒯最】星之队率先集齐了三枚印记，此刻正要向水晶进发。
画面：圭蝶队拼命赶路，提前抵达水晶。
【蒯最】不过，圭蝶队也不愿放弃最后一搏的机会，在水晶等待着他们。
【石任】冠军的名字，即将揭晓！让我们回到赛场，为你们支持的选手，加油助威吧！
切镜回赛场，星之队五人在中路高地前，开始向水晶进发。

entries.text:
Transition Placeholder: The moment the Crimson Cub falls, Yao strikes a cool pose for stealing the Red Buff, only to find it went to the protagonist.
[Dongfang Yao] What?
[Cup] (Dongfang Yao wanted to use Smite to steal Gui Die's Red Buff, but he used it too early! It was eventually taken by a teammate!)
Just then, the bottom second tower and middle first tower light up with blue and red pillars.
[Cup] (The situation on the field is changing in an instant! The battle between the two teams on the other side has also settled!)
[Protagonist] (The ownership of the middle first tower... has changed. What happened?)
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：在猩红幼兽倒下的一刻，曜摆出抢到红的帅气Pose，结果却发现红到了主角身上。
【东方曜】什么？
【杯子】（东方曜想用惩戒抢圭蝶的红，结果放早了！最后被队友收下！）
就在此时，下二塔、中一塔，接连亮起蓝色和红色的光柱。
【杯子】（场上局势瞬息万变！两支队伍在另一边的较量也尘埃落定了！）
【主角】（中一塔的归属……变了。发生什么事了？）

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the crowd gasps.
[Shi Ren] A clash between top teams indeed! The situation on the field is changing in an instant!
Visual: Meng Ya and Sun Bin are knocked down, Qing Lan triumphantly snatches the Mechanism Mark and holds it high.
[Kuai Zui] Team Gui Die quickly changed tactics, ambushed Team Star in the river, and successfully snatched the Mechanism Mark!
Visual: At the top second tower, the protagonist holds a mark, hearing the crowd gasp, looking confused. Shi covers her mouth in shock, and Dongfang Yao stops mid-victory punch.
[Kuai Zui] Team Star's other members don't seem to have reacted yet. Fortunately, they also obtained a Magic Mark.
Visual: Of the six towers, the middle-first and top-second now glow blue, while the top-first and bottom-first glow red.
[Kuai Zui] Team Gui Die has caught up by one point, and the score is now tied!
Visual: The commentators are passionate, and the crowd is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Who will emerge victorious in the final showdown? Stay tuned!
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众发出惊呼声。
【石任】不愧是强队的交锋，现场局势真是瞬息万变！
画面：蒙犽和孙膑被击倒在地，青岚耀武扬威地夺走了机关印记，正高高举着。
【蒯最】圭蝶队迅速改变策略，在河道伏击星之队，成功抢下机关印记！
画面：上二塔，主角拿着印记，听见观众惊呼，表情懵了。西施震惊捂嘴，东方曜胜利挥拳到一半也停下了。
【蒯最】星之队的其他队友好像还没反应过来。好在，他们也拿到了魔道印记。
画面：六座塔，现在中一、上二亮起蓝光，上一、下一亮起红光。
【蒯最】圭蝶队追上一分，场上局势来到了平手！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】最后的角逐，究竟鹿死谁手？精彩继续！

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the crowd gasps.
[Shi Ren] A clash between top teams indeed! The situation on the field is changing in an instant!
Visual: Fei Han and Qing Lan are left hanging in mid-air by the Cloud Eye, Sun Bin is panting, the protagonist watches with arms crossed, and Meng Ya waves at them.
[Kuai Zui] Team Gui Die tried to ambush Team Star in the river, but Team Star's support arrived quickly, preventing them from succeeding.
Visual: At the top second tower, Dongfang Yao is knocked down by a Dragon Tooth hammer, Gui Die fires a cold arrow, but Li Yuanfen is struck by Dongfang Yao's sword.
[Kuai Zui] However, Team Star's plan at the top second tower also met resistance; both teams have suffered heavy losses.
[Kuai Zui] The number of marks for both sides remains unchanged, and Team Star is still in the lead!
Visual: The commentators are passionate, and the crowd is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Not many chances left for Team Gui Die. Will the situation change? Let's cut back to the arena!
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众发出惊呼声。
【石任】不愧是强队的交锋，现场局势真是瞬息万变！
画面：妃寒和青岚灰头土脸被浮云瞰吊在半空，孙膑气喘吁吁，主角抱臂看着，蒙犽还朝他们挥手。
【蒯最】圭蝶队试图在河道伏击星之队，但星之队的支援来得很快，没让他们得逞。
画面：上二塔，东方曜被龙牙锤倒在地，圭蝶抬手放出冷箭，李元芬却被东方曜的剑砍中。
【蒯最】不过，星之队在上二塔的计划也遭到了阻力，两支队伍打得两败俱伤。
【蒯最】双方的印记数量没有变化，星之队依旧领先！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】留给圭蝶队的机会不多了。局势还会发生变化吗？让我们把镜头切回赛场！

entries.text:
Custom combat placeholder:

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the crowd cheers.
[Shi Ren] Friends, we have results from all three lanes!
Visual: Shi and the protagonist reach out to touch the mark together; Shi smiles as if it took no effort at all.
[Kuai Zui] Team Star fought a beautiful battle in the Magic Lane, and this mark was easily secured.
Visual: Li Yuanfen is left hanging in mid-air by the Cloud Eye and taken back to the fountain.
[Kuai Zui] Looking at the Mechanism Lane, Li Yuanfen took on two at once—courageous! But in the end, they were defeated.
Visual: Dongfang Yao is beaten up, his face pressed against the screen. Behind him, Dragon Tooth and Qing Lan stand with arms crossed and cold eyes, tossing the mark in their hands with disdain.
[Kuai Zui] While his teammates enjoy the joy of victory, Dongfang Yao is also carrying the burden. Fortunately, his efforts have paid off.
Visual: Blue light pillars rise at the middle-first and bottom-first towers. A red pillar rises at the top-first.
[Kuai Zui] The result of the first round—Team Star is currently in the lead!
Visual: The commentators are passionate, and the crowd is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Will Team Star maintain their advantage to the end? Can Team Gui Die make a comeback? Let's wait and see!
Cut back to the arena.
entries.zh_text:
观赛区内，全场观众欢呼。
【石任】观众朋友们，三路交锋都有了结果！
画面：西施和主角一同伸手触碰印记，西施微笑，仿佛不费吹灰之力。
【蒯最】星之队在魔道路打了一场漂亮的胜仗，这枚印记被轻松收入囊中。
画面：李元芬灰头土脸地被浮云瞰吊着，带回泉水。
【蒯最】再看机关路，李元芬一个打两个，勇气可嘉！不过最终，还是遗憾败北。
画面：东方曜被胖揍，脸都贴在屏幕上，他身后，龙牙和青岚一个抱臂一个冷眼，不屑地把印记抛在手中把玩。
【蒯最】在队友们享受喜悦之时，东方曜也在负重前行。好在他的付出有了不错的回报。
画面：中一和下一升起蓝色光柱。上一升起红色光柱。
【蒯最】第一轮碰撞的结果——星之队，暂时领先！
画面：解说慷慨激昂，观众更加沸腾。
【石任】星之队会一路优势到底吗？圭蝶队又能否后来居上？我们拭目以待！
切回赛场。

entries.text:
Transition Placeholder:
Both sides confront each other. Gui Die manifests a bow, arrows pointed directly at Dongfang Yao. Dongfang Yao's sword is already drawn, and the protagonist grips their weapon, ready to fight at any moment.
Just then, the barrier of the dome is shattered by the red power of the Sealed Gods. Everyone looks up in panic.
Jiang Ziya and Xing Li arrive from the sky, landing after breaking the barrier. Dust rises, and everyone covers their noses and mouths, coughing.
Before the dust settles, Jiang Ziya's majestic voice is heard.
[Jiang Ziya] Where is the Divine Staff?
[Xing Li] It doesn't seem to be here. Did he lie to us?
Dongfang Yao frowns deeply, gripping his Star Sword vigilantly.
[Dongfang Yao] You again...
Jiang Ziya's contemptuous gaze passes over Dongfang Yao and looks directly at the Cloud Eye, calling out to the Master.
[Jiang Ziya] Hand over the Divine Staff, and I will leave.
Far away at the Tongtian Tower, the Master's pupils dilate.
Meanwhile, outside the arena, Jiang Ziya's threat appears on the broadcast screen. The scene is in an uproar, and the Star Glow team tenses up, looking serious.
[Xing Mang] Lingyun Guards, follow me!
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：
双方对峙，圭蝶幻化出弓，箭簇直指东方曜，东方曜手中的剑也已出鞘，主角握紧武器，随时准备战斗。
就在这时，穹顶的结界被红色封神之力冲破，众人惊慌抬头。
姜子牙和星离从空中而来，冲破结界之后落地，烟尘四起，所有人都捂住口鼻开始咳嗽。
烟尘尚未散去，姜子牙威严的声音就已传来。
【姜子牙】神杖，在何处？
【星离】看起来不在这里。难道，他骗了我们？
东方曜狠狠皱眉，警惕地握紧星辰之剑。
【东方曜】又是你们……
姜子牙轻蔑的眼神略过东方曜，直接看向浮云瞰，向夫子喊话。
【姜子牙】交出神杖，我自会离去。
远在通天塔的夫子瞳孔一震。
与此同时，赛场外，转播大屏幕上出现姜子牙的威胁，现场一片哗然，星芒顿时紧绷起来，神色严肃。
【星芒】凌云卫，跟我来！

entries.text:
In the spectator area, the crowd gasps.
[Shi Ren] A clash between top teams indeed! The situation on the field is changing in an instant!
Visual: Meng Ya and Sun Bin are knocked down, Qing Lan triumphantly snatches the Mechanism Mark and holds it high.
[Kuai Zui] Team Gui Die quickly changed tactics, ambushed Team Star in the river, and successfully snatched the Mechanism Mark!
Visual: At the middle second tower, the protagonist holds a mark, hearing the crowd gasp, looking confused. Shi covers her mouth in shock, and Dongfang Yao stops mid-victory punch.
[Kuai Zui] Team Star's other members don't seem to have reacted yet. Fortunately, they also obtained a Magic Mark.
Visual: Of the six towers, the top-first and middle-second now glow blue, while the middle-first and bottom-first glow red.
[Kuai Zui] Team Gui Die has caught up by one point, and the score is now tied!
Visual: The commentators are passionate, and the crowd is even more excited.
[Shi Ren] Who will emerge victorious in the final showdown? Stay tuned!

[Kuai Zui] The Star Team fought a beautiful battle in the Magic Lane, and the mark was easily claimed.

entries.text:
Transition Placeholder:
Team Star and Team Gui Die take their positions at the start and the crystal. In the spectator area, the audience sees the broadcast and goes wild, taking turns cheering for their supported teams. The camera cuts to the commentators.
[Xing Mang] Now, all troops, advance!
Inside the arena, the defensive towers activate one by one: first tower, second tower, and finally the Glory Crystal. Minion waves spawn.
Team Star runs forward amidst the cheering, with Meng Ya quickly setting up tactics.
[Meng Ya] Sun Bin, Shi, come with me to the first tower. Dongfang Yao, you two go get the Azure Spirit Beast first!
 the other four nod and quickly split into two groups. The camera follows the protagonist and Dongfang Yao as they run toward the Azure Spirit Beast point.
entries.zh_text:
过场占位：
星之队和圭蝶队分别在起点和水晶就位。
观赛区，观众看到转播，彻底沸腾，轮流呼喊着支持队伍的名字。镜头给到解说。
【星芒】现在，全军出击！
赛场内，防御塔一座座启动，一塔，二塔，最后是荣耀水晶。兵线刷新。
星之队在呼喊声中向前跑，途中蒙犽快速布置战术。
【蒙犽】孙膑西施，跟我去一塔。东方曜，你们两个先去拿湛蓝灵兽！
其他四人点头，迅速兵分两路。镜头跟随主角和东方曜，到跑向湛蓝灵兽点的途中。

entries.text: Still don't have the courage to take the initiative to greet people...
entries.zh_text: 还是没勇气主动和人打招呼……

entries.text: I wish someone would take me on an adventure.
entries.zh_text: 要是有人带我一起冒险就好了。

entries.text: Sorry, did I startle you? Was that you singing just now?
entries.zh_text: 抱歉，我吓到你了吧，刚刚是你在唱歌吗？

entries.text: Sorry, did I startle you? Was that you singing just now?
entries.zh_text: 抱歉，我吓到你了吧，刚刚是你在唱歌吗？

entries.text: Huff... huff... huff...
Memory of Young Wood, Memory of Green Wood, Memory of Wild Wood...
entries.zh_text: 幼木之忆、青木之忆、狂木之忆……

entries.text: Thank you! The Giant Wood Fence's state has stabilized!
entries.zh_text: 谢谢你，巨木篱的状态稳定下来了！

entries.text: I'm practicing my kicks! I want to be able to kick it far and accurate!
entries.zh_text: 我在练习踢球！因为我想踢得又远又准！

entries.text: See the big wooden fence across the road? Once I've trained more, I'll be able to smash them with explosive fruits!
entries.zh_text: 看到路对面的大木篱了吗？等我练得更厉害之后，就能用爆炸果实砸到它们！

entries.text: One, two, one, two!
entries.zh_text: 一、二、一、二！

entries.text: Want to play soccer together?
entries.zh_text: 要一起来踢球吗？

entries.text: Smash and run! Yay!
entries.zh_text: 砸完就跑！好耶！

entries.text: Are you ready for the second stage!
entries.zh_text: 第二关准备好了嘛！

entries.text: Question: How much does the recipe for Cold Brew Tea cost?
entries.zh_text: 请听题，复原冷萃茶的药方卖多少钱？

entries.text: 240 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 两百四十环金。

entries.text: 270 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 两百七十环金。

entries.text: 180 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 一百八十环金。

entries.text: Congratulations, that's correct.
entries.zh_text: 恭喜你，答对咯。

entries.text: The next question is about the Gourmet's shop. Let's proceed when you're ready.
entries.zh_text: 下一题是肴馔家商店的问题，准备好了就来下一题吧。

entries.text: The next question is about the Gourmet's shop. Let's proceed when you're ready.
entries.zh_text: 下一题是肴馔家商店的问题，准备好了就来下一题吧。

entries.text: Sorry, that's incorrect.
entries.zh_text: 很遗憾，答错了。

entries.text: Sorry, that's incorrect.
entries.zh_text: 很遗憾，答错了。

entries.text: The next question is about the Gourmet's shop. Let's proceed when you're ready.
entries.zh_text: 下一题是肴馔家商店的问题，准备好了就来下一题吧。

entries.text: Last question, let's go!
entries.zh_text: 最后一题，加油！

entries.text: Question: How much does a Dawn Fish cost?
entries.zh_text: 请听题，鸣晓鱼多少钱一条？

entries.text: 6 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 六环金。

entries.text: Sorry, that's incorrect. The challenge is now over.
entries.zh_text: 很遗憾，答错了，本次闯关全部结束。

entries.text: 29,000 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 两万九千环金。

entries.text: Sorry, that's incorrect. The challenge is now over.
entries.zh_text: 很遗憾，答错了，本次闯关全部结束。

entries.text: Four hundred gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 四百环金。

entries.text: Correct! That's the end of this challenge!
entries.zh_text: 答对咯，本次闯关全部结束！

entries.text: 60 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 六十环金。

entries.text: 20 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 二十环金。

entries.text: 120 gold rings.
entries.zh_text: 一百二十环金。

entries.text: Isn't this the new member of Team Star who is competing with Gui Die for the record?
entries.zh_text: 这不是和圭蝶争夺记录的星之队新成员吗？

entries.text: Did you see that student just now? I heard his climbing speed is on par with Guidie's!
entries.zh_text: 你看到没，刚刚那个同学，听说登顶速度和圭蝶不相上下！

entries.text: Really? I didn't expect to be able to compete with that Guidie, so impressive!
entries.zh_text: 真的吗？没想到能和那个圭蝶争锋，好厉害啊！

entries.text: Isn't this the freshman who is challenging Gui Die's record?
entries.zh_text: 这不是挑战圭蝶纪录的新生吗？

entries.text: Yo! The Guidie record-breaker! I've heard all about it! That's amazing!
entries.zh_text: 哟！圭蝶纪录挑战者！我可听说了！太厉害了！

entries.text: It's the freshman who broke Guidie's record!
entries.zh_text: 是挑战圭蝶记录的新生！

entries.text: Is this the new Team Star member who is challenging Gui Die's record!
entries.zh_text: 这位就是挑战圭蝶纪录的星之队新队员吗！

entries.text: Did you see that student just now? I heard he's the freshman who almost broke Guidie's record!
entries.zh_text: 你看到没，刚刚那个同学，听说他差点打破圭蝶记录的新生！

entries.text: Really? I didn't expect to be able to go head-to-head with Guidie, that's incredible!
entries.zh_text: 真的吗？没想到能和圭蝶一较高下，太厉害了！

entries.text: Are you the freshman challenging Guidie's record?!
entries.zh_text: 你是那个挑战圭蝶纪录的新生吗！

entries.text: Of course I support Guidie.
entries.zh_text: 我当然是支持圭蝶。

entries.text: If you're confident in your skills, go to the cave ahead and sign up with our Senior Yingzhao.
entries.zh_text: 如果你对自己身手自信的话，就去前面的洞窟找我们英招学长报名吧。

entries.text: The effects of the two strange 'Little Wood Fence' transformation potions have worn off, and they have returned to human form—it's Senior Zhuge Liang and Senior Zhou Yu. They discuss the future after returning to the Land of Three Kingdoms; this seems to be the final battle of the Yu-Liang rivalry...
entries.zh_text: 两只奇怪的“小木篱”变形药水效果结束了，恢复了人形，竟然是诸葛亮学长和周瑜学长。他们谈论起返回三分之地之后的未来，瑜亮之争这似乎是最后一战……

entries.text: The five bronze armor fragments are collected. The history of Qiushui's war and the clues to the Pillar of Heaven Ruins are becoming clear...
entries.zh_text: 五块青铜铠甲碎片集齐，秋水的战争往事与通往天柱墟的线索在你面前逐渐清晰……

entries.text: Zhuorong is lured out by the scent of the honey sauce set by Wang Xun and appears before you.
entries.zh_text: 灼绒被王寻布下的蜜肴酱气味吸引，出现在你面前。

entries.text: According to the Mozi projection records, Mozi once returned to the depths of the Hidden Weapon City, to the place where the Hengzhu Flow Mech was once kept. As he mourned, the "Tianheng" system activated—it was an operating system formed within the mech after the Hengzhu Flow, now completely integrated with it.
entries.zh_text: 神工役投影记载，墨子曾重返藏兵城底，昔日安放衡注流机甲之处。他黯然缅怀之际，“天衡” 系统应声启动——这竟是衡注流后，在机甲内自改造形成的操作系统，天衡系统与机甲彻底融为一体。

entries.text: With the help of the 'Flow's' resonance, you see an echo of the past: The God-Sealer speaks with anger and shatters the bronze stele, dissatisfied with Jixia's forgetting of the heroes of the past, and solemnly recites their names... As he recites, the phantoms of the God-Forgers appear one by one to pay their respects. The God-Sealer returns, vowing to reclaim their glory.
entries.zh_text: 借助流的感应，你看到一段过往回响：封神者语带愠怒，击碎了青铜碑，他不满稷下对昔日英雄的遗忘，庄重念出那些名字……随着诵念，神铸者虚影依次浮现行礼。封神者归来，誓为他们重夺荣光。

entries.text: Ding Wuhai hijacked the elite guards sent to intercept him, putting on a manic performance. Upon closer inspection, it seemed to be a bitter recount of the mockery he faced from classmates when he first arrived at Jixia. Suddenly, Ding Wuhai unleashed immense power, swallowing the colors of the entire space into black and white.
entries.zh_text: 丁午亥劫持了前来堵截的近卫巧兵，上演出一番癫狂戏码，细看之下，竟似乎是在控诉自己初到稷下之时，遭受同窗讥讽的经历。随后，丁午亥爆发出巨大的威力，将整片空间的色彩吞噬成黑白。

entries.text: The fallen Wanshu Hammer projects a dusty image of the time when the Four Heroes of Jixia were gathered. With graduation approaching, the four sat down to write a farewell poem: 'A wisp of moon over Jixia, drying away the sorrows of the Three Kingdoms...'
entries.zh_text: 倒地的万枢重锤投出一段尘封的影像，正是当年稷下四杰齐聚之时。离校在即，四人伏案执笔，共作下一首《水榭留别》：稷下一缕月，晒消三分愁……

entries.text: The restless Ding-Wu-Hai settles into calm, revealing a magnificent scene—under the aurora created by magic, Zhuge Liang and Sima Yi stand side by side—if the world before us is only black and white, then you and I shall use our own hands to create our own light.
entries.zh_text: 躁动的丁午亥归于平静，展示出一片瑰丽的画面——魔道变化出的漫天极光之下，诸葛亮与司马懿并肩而立——若眼前的世界只剩黑白，你我变当凭双手，造自己的光。

entries.text: After completing the seven trials of the Cloud Terrace and using the token left by Zhuge Liang, you unlock the seal on the floating rock platform above his secret chamber.
entries.zh_text: 历经七座云台试炼，依靠诸葛亮留下的令牌，你解开了诸葛亮密室上方的悬空岩台封印。

entries.text: Through Life Echo, Gan Sui and you see the past of Dongfang Jing and Bian Que in the garden. It turns out Dongfang Jing refused to take the potion and personally severed the Shuochun Bud.
entries.zh_text: 通过生命回响，甘遂和你看到东方镜与扁鹊在园中的往事。原来是东方镜拒绝服下药剂，并亲自斩断了朔椿芽。

entries.text: After finding all the little radishes, you arrive before the Radish King. In recognition and gratitude for your eradication of the Sprout of Calamity, it shares its power with you.
entries.zh_text: 找到了所有小萝卜后，来到莱菔王面前。出于对你铲除朔椿芽的认可与感激，它将自己的力量分享给了你。

entries.text: Place the Blessing of Cooking to see an echo of the past: Villager Yun Shuming used Jixia Fox Wheat to cook Cloud Harvest Flatbread, inviting the villagers to come and enjoy it together.
entries.zh_text: 放上炊香之祈，看到往日的回响：村民云淑明以稷狐麦为原料烹制出丰云大饼，招呼百家们前来一起享用。

entries.text: Place the Blessing of Harvest to see an echo of the past: Hua Qinmi of the Hundred Herbs Family once placed Jixia Fox Wheat before the Prayer Stone, offering a blessing of abundance for the Cloud Plains.
entries.zh_text: 放上丰登之祈，看到往日的回响：之前百草家花卿觅将稷狐麦放在祈福之石前，为丰云野献上五谷丰登的祝福。

entries.text: Place the Blessing of Fishing to see an echo of the past: Anglers Man Xiaofeng and Fang Yu waited on the shore of the cave lake, hunting for the strange fish caused by the cloud flow anomalies of that year.
entries.zh_text: 放上渔获之祈，看到往日的回响：垂钓家满小枫和方鱼蹲守在洞窟湖面的岸上，钓猎当年云流异变的怪鱼。

entries.text: Place the Blessing of Brewing to see an echo of the past: Li Bai, dead drunk, leaned against the back of the Prayer Stone, sipping Cloud Brew and reciting poetry in praise of it.
entries.zh_text: 放上曲酿之祈，看到往日的回响：李白大醉酩酊，靠坐在祈福之石后面畅饮着丰云酿，口中念着赞美诗词。

entries.text: Qing Ze tells you the origin of the butterfly-wing-shaped fragments and speculates that the dream power within Dream-Whisper Lake has gone out of control.
entries.zh_text: 青泽向你讲述蝶翅状残片的来历，推测梦语湖内的梦能力量已经失控。

entries.text: The Master of Ingenuity appears, his mind clouded by the intrusion of dream energy.
entries.zh_text: 奇巧大师现身，受梦能侵扰，已然神智混乱。

entries.text: The moment the Master of Ingenuity is defeated, his mind suddenly clears, leaving only regret in his eyes.
entries.zh_text: 奇巧大师落败的刹那，神智骤然清明，眼中只剩悔意。

entries.text: Defeat Botu, the thorns dissipate, and the Butterfly Messenger statue glows once again.
entries.zh_text: 击败伯屠，荆棘散去，蝶使雕像重新焕发出光芒。

entries.text: Combining the four Dream Fragment Charms causes a wisp of dream energy to rise, pointing toward the Nightmare Abyss.
entries.zh_text: 将四枚美梦残符拼合在一起，一缕梦能随之升腾，指向梦魇深窟。

entries.text: The Butterfly Envoy statue resonates with the Dream Slate, and the activated map slate reveals new clues.
entries.zh_text: 蝶使雕像与美梦石板相呼应，被激活的地图石板显示了新的线索。

entries.text: After obtaining the Burning Mountain Cauldron Keystone on the second basement level, you meet Bai Lu. She is also curious about the final fate of the hero Qiushui and tells you some of his past. She asks you to go see how his story ends, while she sets off for Spring Creek Plains.
entries.zh_text: 在地下二层拿到燃山釜钥石后，遇到了白露，她也好奇英雄秋水最后的结局，并告诉了你秋水的一些往事，让你去看看秋水最后的结局，而白露则动身前往了春溪原。

entries.text: After arriving at the Pillar of Heaven, you encounter an advance team sent by the academy and are trapped by a magic circle as an intruder. Fortunately, the team leader, Gu Lai, steps in to resolve the misunderstanding.
entries.zh_text: 来到撑天主柱后，你遇到了学院派来探索的先遣队，并被当成入侵者用法阵困住，好在先遣队队长古来出面，化解了这场误会。

entries.text: You have finally reached the top of the Sky-Supporting Pillar and found Qiushui, but he is already nearly controlled by the Calamity Beast...
entries.zh_text: 终于来到了撑天主柱顶部，你见到了秋水，但他已经快被灾兽完全控制……

entries.text: The Calamity Beast is defeated, but Qiushui is fading away. Before dissolving into the wind, he recalls the flowers of Chunxi Plains...
entries.zh_text: 灾兽被击败，但秋水也即将消逝，在散入风中前，他回忆起了春溪原的花……

entries.text: The Three Lights have united, and the path to the Pillar of Heaven has opened.
entries.zh_text: 三光合一，前往撑天主柱的通路已然开启。

entries.text: You see the lingering shadow of the hero Qiushui luring the enemy deep. At this moment, a 'Wind-Thing' collector named Bailu appears, who is also trying to uncover the final fate of this vanished hero. The priority is to find the Divine Craftsman in the Cui Shi Hall, collect the Burning Mountain Stone Key, and head to the central pillar of light...
entries.zh_text: 你见到了英雄秋水诱敌深入的昔日残影，此时自称白露的风物家现身，她也正想探寻这消失英雄的最终结局。当务之急，是找到位于萃石厅的神工役，收集燃山石钥前往中心的光柱……

entries.text: You and Bailu see the lingering shadow of the hero Qiushui luring the enemy deep, but what was the hero's fate? The priority is to find the Divine Craftsman in the Cui Shi Hall, collect the Burning Mountain Stone Key, and head to the central pillar of light...
entries.zh_text: 你与白露见到了英雄秋水诱敌深入的昔日残影，但英雄的结局如何？当务之急，是找到位于萃石厅的神工役，收集燃山石钥前往中心的光柱……

entries.text: After returning to the Pillar of Heaven camp with the Burning Mountain Cauldron Keystone, you see reinforcements sent by the academy, and the camp is being repaired with their help.
entries.zh_text: 拿到燃山釜钥石返回撑天主柱的营地后，看到了学院派来的增援，营地在增援的帮助下进行着修复。

entries.text: The sound of mechanisms shifting echoes from the depths of the hall. The stairs begin to rotate, and a new path opens up.
entries.zh_text: 大厅的深处传来机关传动的声音，楼梯开始旋转 ，新的通路打开了。

entries.text: The drill has been started, but it seems some malfunction is still hindering it.
entries.zh_text: 钻机被启动了，但似乎还有什么故障在阻碍着它。

entries.text: The malfunction has been cleared, and the drill is fully operational, digging deeper to uncover even more ancient secrets.
entries.zh_text: 故障已被排除，钻机完全启动，向下钻研出更加古老的秘密。

entries.text: Encouraged by Tang Yingliu, Lingzi Feng tries playing the flute again. This time, the melody finally lures the Starry Night Fish, and with your combined efforts, it has nowhere to escape...
entries.zh_text: 在唐映流的鼓励下，灵子风再次尝试吹响了笛子。这一次，笛声终于引来了星夜鱼，在你们的配合下，它已无处可逃……

entries.text: The recording begins to play, and you see the shadows of students from the past. They are about to head to the front lines, worried that they will be forgotten by time and vanish without a trace, so they recorded this final message, hoping to pass on their courage and conviction...
entries.zh_text: 影像开始播放，你看到学子们的昔日虚影。他们即将奔赴前线，担心自己会被时间遗忘，就此消逝得悄无声息，所以记录下这最后一段影像，希望将这份勇气与信念传承下去……

entries.text: Following the instructions in the final log, you issue commands to the excavators, ending their endless mining mission. After the countdown, the excavators speak their final tribute, and you say your final goodbyes to them...
entries.zh_text: 你顺从最终日志的指示，向挖掘者们提出指令，结束它们永无休止的开采使命。倒数结束后，挖掘者们说出了最终献词，你也彻底与它们道别……

entries.text: With Yang Ling's help, Yu Kun regains consciousness, but the joy is short-lived. The vibrations from the battle cause the cliff to shake, and a giant boulder falls from above. In an instant, Yu Kun steps forward to hold up the boulder, saving everyone. As Yu Kun struggles, Master Luban steps in and uses his mechanical arm to resolve the crisis.
entries.zh_text: 于坤在阳翎的帮助下重归清醒，可好景不长，方才战斗产生的震动令山崖震颤，一块巨石突然自头顶砸落。刹那间，于坤挺身扛住巨石，救下了大家。于坤苦苦支撑之际，鲁班大师出面，用机关臂化解了危机。

entries.text: Being fully immersed in the Healing Spring makes the aquaphobic Yu Kun very uneasy. At this moment, Yang Ling uses magic to create air for him in the water. Yu Kun is no longer afraid and gradually wakes up.
entries.zh_text: 全身浸入疗愈泉，令惧水的于坤感到十分不安。这时，阳翎释放魔道术，为他在水中制造出了空气，于坤终于不再惧怕，渐渐苏醒过来。

entries.text: Su Chen arrives at the Heavenly Pillar Ruins and gazes at the magnificent sight. Suddenly, he hears an old man's sigh, and the village chief of Hermit Village appears there as well...
entries.zh_text: 宿尘来到天柱墟前，眺望那恢宏的景象，耳边突然传来老者的感慨，隐逸村的村长竟也出现在了这里……

entries.text: Su Chen finally arrives at the Heavenly Pillar Ruins, only to get into an argument with an old man. It turns out the village chief of Hermit Village has been secretly obstructing the investigation all along...
entries.zh_text: 宿尘好不容易来到天柱墟前，却与一个老者爆发争吵，原来，隐逸村的村长竟一直在暗中阻挠调查……

entries.text: The Giant Wood Fence on the Li-Escape Hill remains asleep. Liu Zhiqiu speaks of its past, as if it has always been there, with no one knowing its true origins.
entries.zh_text: 篱遁丘上的巨木篱依然沉睡着，柳知湫说起它的过往，仿佛巨木篱一直在此，无人知晓它的过去。

entries.text: The aura of the three memory fragments awakened the sleeping Giant Wood Fence. Its state has stabilized, and Liu Zhiqiu expresses her gratitude.
entries.zh_text: 三块记忆碎片的气息唤醒了沉睡的巨木篱，它的状态稳定了下来，柳知湫对你表示感谢。

entries.text: After clashing with the Wild Sword of Ten Thousand Laws and completing their trials, the Proof of Divine Martial Arts and the Proof of Inherited Will have fused into the Spirit-Forging Seal, returning to your hands.
entries.zh_text: 与万法狂剑交锋、完成他们的试练后，神武之证与承志之证也已熔铸为一，成为铸灵符印重回你的手中。

entries.text: Placing the Proof of Divine Martial Arts and the Proof of Inherited Will into the High Altar causes the glowing seal to rise, indicating that the path ahead is clear.
entries.zh_text: 将神武之证与承志之证放入至高台内，辉光符印终于冉冉升起，昭示着前路已经明晰。

entries.text: All four star charts have finally been recovered. The starry sky that once shone above the ancients thousands of years ago still shines before our eyes today.
entries.zh_text: 四张星图终于悉数收回，曾映照在千百年前古人头顶的星空，如今依旧闪耀在我们眼前。

entries.text: As the visitor steps here, the surrounding aura shifts, and the ancient bronze giant bird, Bi Fang, appears.
entries.zh_text: 随着来人踏足此地，周遭气息异动，古老的青铜巨鸟毕方应声登场。

entries.text: Amidst a deep dragon's roar, a warrior from the past appears before you.
entries.zh_text: 沉沉的龙吟声中，往日的战士出现在面前。

entries.text: The Dragon-Riding Spirit-Caster blows the Dragon-Roar Horn, and the long-lost dragon roar echoes across the sky...
entries.zh_text: 龙骑铸灵吹响了龙吟号角，天边响起了久违的龙吼……

entries.text: Aman believes he carries the hope of rebuilding his home and must leave, but after learning that Yuechang wants to perform "Ballad of the Thousand Caves and Neon Clouds" with him, he agrees to participate in the concert.
entries.zh_text: 阿尔曼认为自己背负着重建家园的希望，不得不离开，可在得知越裳想与他合奏《千窟云霓谣》后，他还是同意了参加此次演奏会。

entries.text: Zhang Nanshan and Li Beihai agree to participate in the concert and arrange to meet you in the lobby.
entries.zh_text: 张南珊与李北海同意了参加演奏会，与你约定在前厅会和。

entries.text: Chen Mao asks for your help in finding the lost wings of the mechanical kite. Fang Zhi near the weaving machine on the second floor might have some clues.
entries.zh_text: 陈卯拜托你帮忙寻回丢失的机关鸢翅膀，二楼塑织机附近的芳织或许知道些线索。

entries.text: See that grid button? Switch it to sow an entire row at once. Hurry and plant <001>four Fragrant Melons</>!
entries.zh_text: 看到一格按钮了吗？切换后可以给一整行播种，快一次种<001>四个香蜜瓜</>！

entries.text: Don't forget to pray for your friends; it helps their crops grow better.
entries.zh_text: 也别忘了帮好友祈福，可以让作物生长得更好。

entries.text: Go help your friends with 5 blessings, and they'll come to help you too!
entries.zh_text: 快去帮好友祈福五次，朋友也会来帮你的！

entries.text: Once you've bought it, head to the second area to try it out. Just enter Build Mode and select the template from the top left.
entries.zh_text: 买到了就赶紧去第二区域试试吧，进入建造模式，选择左上角的应用模板就好啦。

entries.text: The courtyard is much brighter now. But compared to the interior, it's a bit dark, so let's decorate that too!
entries.zh_text: 这下院子里亮堂了不少呢。但一对比室内就有些暗，也去布置下吧！

entries.text: The indoor space is limited. You need to switch the building view before placing it.
entries.zh_text: 室内空间有限，需要切换下建造视角再摆放。

entries.text: Find your favorite lighting in the furniture storage and place it.
entries.zh_text: 在家具仓库的装饰里，找到你喜欢的灯饰，摆放一下吧。

entries.text: You must mean Senior Guidie. Her ranking on the Merit Board is very high.
entries.zh_text: 你说的应该是圭蝶学姐，她在伯仲榜上的排名可高了。

entries.text: It seems both Xi Shi and Guidie are fated to meet you.
entries.zh_text: 似乎西施和圭蝶都和你很有缘。

entries.text: Exactly! Why not consider joining Senior Guidie's team? You'd definitely be a core member.
entries.zh_text: 就是就是，要不要考虑加入圭蝶学姐的队伍，你一来肯定是核心成员。

entries.text: Please show some support for our senior, Gui Die, from the Magic Academy!
entries.zh_text: 请大家多多关注我们魔道学院的圭蝶学姐！

entries.text: Guidie... I think I've seen her name on the Peerless Ranking, and she's ranked quite high.
entries.zh_text: 圭蝶……我好像在伯仲榜上看到过她的名字，排名还挺靠前的。

entries.text: Who is Guidie?
entries.zh_text: 圭蝶是？

entries.text: You don't know yet? Senior Guidie is the most promising student in the Magic Academy this year.
entries.zh_text: 你也还不知道呀，圭蝶学姐可是今年魔道学院里最有潜力的人。

entries.text: We all think Senior Guidie will definitely win this time.
entries.zh_text: 我们都觉得圭蝶学姐这次一定会获胜。

entries.text: Haha, Senior Guidie really made a splash on the Peerless Ranking, even overshadowing Senior Yao.
entries.zh_text: 哈哈，圭蝶学姐可是在伯仲榜上一鸣惊人，风头都盖过了曜学长呢。

entries.text: Yeah, please support Senior Guidie!
entries.zh_text: 是呀，请多多支持圭蝶学姐哦！

entries.text: About Guidie.
entries.zh_text: 关于圭蝶。

entries.text: Oh my! Is there no law in Jixia? No morals? No rules?
entries.zh_text: 哎呀！稷下是没有王法了么！还有道德吗？还有规矩吗？

entries.text: Thanks for your help, classmate. I barely made it out alive.
entries.zh_text: 感谢同学相助，我算是捡回了这条命。

entries.text: Fair enough. See you at the Feiyu Terrace.
entries.zh_text: 也好，我们非语台见。

entries.text: Fair enough. See you at the Feiyu Terrace.
entries.zh_text: 也好，我们非语台见。

entries.text: Thanks for your concern. It's too dangerous here to stay long. We should leave first.
entries.zh_text: 多谢关心，这里险象环生，不宜久留，不如我们先离开这里。

entries.text: Once we reach the <001>Feiyu Terrace</>, shall I tell you the whole story from the beginning?
entries.zh_text: 等到了<001>非语台</>，我再慢慢告诉你事情的前因后果可好？

entries.text: Just as Captain Guidie thought, you still miss the treasure-hunting life, don't you...
entries.zh_text: 果然和圭蝶队长想的一样，你还是很怀念以前寻宝的生活吧……

entries.text: You have named the tea, and Lengchun suggests finding a place to rest and enjoy it.
entries.zh_text: 你们为茶饮取了名字，冷春提议找个地方歇脚品茶。

entries.text: Lengchun talks about her experiences, saying she envies your frankness and composure. As she speaks, the previous 'Lost-Nose Mouse' returns—it turns out to be a Lost-Nose Mouse. Lengchun asks you to let it taste the tea.
entries.zh_text: 冷春聊起自己的经历，说很羡慕你的坦率从容。正说着，之前的迷鼻鼠又来了——原来是只迷鼻鼠。冷春让你把茶给它尝尝。

entries.text: Under Leng Chun's guidance, you completed the process of preparing the tea base, seasoning, and adding toppings.
entries.zh_text: 在冷春的指导下，你完成了准备茶底、调味和添加小料的流程。

entries.text: Lengchun talks about her experiences, saying she envies your frankness and composure. As she speaks, the previous 'Lost-Nose Mouse' returns—it turns out to be a Lost-Nose Mouse. Lengchun asks you to let it taste the tea.
entries.zh_text: 冷春聊起自己的经历，说很羡慕你的坦率从容。正说着，之前的迷鼻鼠又来了——原来是只迷鼻鼠。冷春让你把茶给它尝尝。

entries.text: Dianji tries to steal the confiscated mechanical puppet, but it goes out of control after being activated, causing panic. Meng Ya and Dianji don't see eye to eye, and Dianji runs off in a rage.
entries.zh_text: 典机想偷走被没收的机关人，没想到启动后失控引发慌乱。蒙犽和典机话不投机半句多，典机气急跑走。

entries.text: Meng Ya is handling a student violation case and asks for your fair judgment. Sha Qi accuses the Student Discipline Department of confiscating his fishing rod, but he was found with dozens of them.
entries.zh_text: 蒙犽正在处理学子违规事件，请你帮忙公正评价。沙奇指责学纪司没收他的鱼竿，但他同时摆了几十根钓竿。

entries.text: The room is piled high with clutter, including the treasure Xi Shi wants to give you. To find it, you agree to help her tidy up the room first.
entries.zh_text: 屋里的东西堆积如山，西施想送你的那件宝贝也在其中，为了找到它，你只好答应西施，一起先好好整理一番房间。

entries.text: After you clean the house, Xishi asks you to help her declutter, but she seems to have a reason for not wanting to throw anything away.
entries.zh_text: 你们清理屋子之后，西施拜托你帮她断舍离，然而每件东西她似乎都有舍不得丢掉的理由。

entries.text: Xi Shi gives you the lucky coin that has accompanied her on hundreds of adventures, hoping you too can find the answer hidden within that miracle.
entries.zh_text: 西施将陪伴她经历上百次探险的幸运币赠送给你，希望你也能找到那个奇迹中蕴藏的答案。

entries.text: You and Xishi enjoy the fireworks together, toasting to the past that has ended and a brand new tomorrow.
entries.zh_text: 你和西施共赏烟花，为断去的过往和崭新的明天干杯。

entries.text: After reciting a poem, Dongfang Yao asks for your opinion. He is in high spirits and plans to write a poem here, thanking you for accompanying him to gaze at the world and compose verses to the stars.
entries.zh_text: 东方曜吟诗后，询问你的看法。他兴致高昂，打算在此刻诗题字，感谢你陪他举目天地，诗赋星辰。

entries.text: Dongfang Yao immediately writes two poems for Meng Ya and the Master. After sending them off with the Great-Eyed Owl, he invites you to the waterfall to critique his work.
entries.zh_text: 东方曜当即为蒙犽和夫子作诗两首，托大眼枭送出后，邀你再去瀑布之上评断诗句。

entries.text: Time to deliver the poem!
entries.zh_text: 送诗去咯！

entries.text: Dongfang Yao says the 'Star Poetry Collection', written in admiration and imitation of Li Bai, is a testament to his travels in Jixia, and the inspiration for his work comes from you, his important partner.
entries.zh_text: 东方曜说因崇拜李白效仿而作的《星辰诗集》，是此前漫游稷下的见证，作品的灵感也源自你这个重要的伙伴。

entries.text: Dongfang Yao invites you to participate in a quiz for the 'Poet Immortal Almanac'. The book peddler changes the questions halfway through, and you realize you've been scammed. Yao decides to write his own poems and wants to find a new place to think.
entries.zh_text: 东方曜为《诗仙年鉴》邀你参与答题。书贩中途换题，你们才意识到被骗。曜打算自己写诗，想换个地思量。

entries.text: Luban precisely cuts the ingredients.
entries.zh_text: 鲁班精准地称切食材。

entries.text: The reappearance of a lost dish in Jixia causes a sensation, and reporters interview you about it.
entries.zh_text: 失传的菜肴重现稷下，引起轰动，记者为此采访了你们。

entries.text: The texture of the mashed and mixed food is surprisingly good. Inspired by this, Lu Ban decides to change his cooking method.
entries.zh_text: 捣碎混合后的食物口感竟然出奇不错，受此启发，鲁班决定改用这种方式做菜。

entries.text: Luban thanks you and gives you the "Hundred-Flavor Mechanical Man" for seasoning.
entries.zh_text: 鲁班向你道谢，送了你能调制香料的“百味机关人”。

entries.text: A dish contains the creator's heart. Only by considering people's tastes and preferences can one make truly delicious food.
entries.zh_text: 菜肴本身蕴含着制作者的心意，只有考虑到人的口味、人的喜好，才能做出好吃的菜肴。

entries.text: Sharing a delicious meal with friends is the true joy of life.
entries.zh_text: 和朋友们一起品尝美食才是真正的乐事。

entries.text: Sharing a delicious meal with friends is the true joy of life.
entries.zh_text: 和朋友们一起品尝美食才是真正的乐事。

entries.text: If it weren't for No. 7's accidental discovery, along with your precise grasp of flavors and bold experimental spirit, we might not have succeeded.
entries.zh_text: 若非七号误打误撞，还有你对口味的精准把握和大胆的实验精神，我们或许无法成功。

entries.text: Luban asks about your taste preferences, but Star No. 7 mistakes your discussion for a command and mixes all the ingredients together.
entries.zh_text: 鲁班询问你的口味喜好，星之七号却误把你们的探讨当做指令，将所有材料混合捣碎。

entries.text: The dish is a great success. Luban saves the recipe and shares the food with everyone. You agree to meet at the Shansheng Courtyard in two days.
entries.zh_text: 菜品大获成功，鲁班保存制作流程，并将菜肴分给大家品尝。你们约定两日后在善生庭见面。

entries.text: Is the Grass-Whisper Leaf actually effective? You and Zhaojun decide to approach the Giant Wood Fence to find out.
entries.zh_text: 草语叶究竟是否有效？你与昭君决定靠近巨木篱，一试究竟。

entries.text: You and Zhaojun do not want to anger the behemoth before you, so you decide to take the Grass-Language Leaf to communicate with it as equals.
entries.zh_text: 你和昭君不愿惹眼前的庞然巨物生气，决定服下草语叶，与它平等沟通。

entries.text: It is getting late, but Zhaojun is unwilling to rest, proposing to go find the Giant Wood Fence immediately.
entries.zh_text: 天色已经不早，昭君不愿多做休息，提议直接去寻巨木篱。

entries.text: Do you feel any better now? Would you like to rest here for a while?
entries.zh_text: 现在有觉得好些吗，要不要就在这休息一会？

entries.text: Do you feel any better now? Would you like to rest here for a while?
entries.zh_text: 现在有觉得好些吗，要不要就在这休息一会？

entries.text: Mu Chun asks you about the investigation results of the ice anomaly, and Zhaojun admits that the frost nearby is caused by her.
entries.zh_text: 暮春向你问起寒冰异象的调查结果，昭君坦诚说附近的霜寒都因她而起。

entries.text: Talk.
entries.zh_text: 对话。

entries.text: The Hidden Weapon City is filled with traps and is extremely dangerous. But you and Garo walk side by side, showing no signs of backing down.
entries.zh_text: 藏兵城机关密布，甚是凶险。但你与伽罗并肩而行，毫无退意。

entries.text: Talk.
entries.zh_text: 对话。

entries.text: Protecting civilization is a precept passed down through generations in the Thousand Caves. Galo tries to use this to awaken Chen Zhuo's conscience and persuade him to stop.
entries.zh_text: 守护文明，是千窟代代相传的训诫。伽罗试图以此唤醒尘琢的良知，劝他收手。

entries.text: Galo seems very familiar with Chen Zhuo. When you curiously ask, Galo slowly recounts the fire that everyone knows about...
entries.zh_text: 伽罗似乎对尘琢很是熟悉。你好奇问起，伽罗缓缓讲起了那场世人皆知的大火……

entries.text: In the book, after being struck by lightning, Northern Yao is reborn, only to be mocked by guards again outside his family home...
entries.zh_text: 书中，北方曜遭雷击后，历劫重生，回到了北方家门外又遭守卫奚落……

entries.text: Dongfang Yao reclaims his title as the God of Commerce, and Master Lu offers guidance on his romantic troubles.
entries.zh_text: 北方曜重夺商神之名，鲁大师为其情路指点迷津。

entries.text: In the book, Northern Yao delivers ice cream to the waterfall and sees Little Dong Yu treating the frog, finally learning of the Deer Clan's kindness.
entries.zh_text: 书中，北方曜快送冰糕至水瀑，见小东瑜救治咕呱，方得知稚鹿派单的善心。

entries.text: The God of Commerce election is held as scheduled, with Xing Shao kicking things off with an enthusiastic opening!
entries.zh_text: 商神推选会如期举行，主持人星少热烈开场！

entries.text: Dongfang Yao heads calmly to the meeting, only to be mocked and harassed by the Northern family's servants along the way.
entries.zh_text: 北方曜沉着赴会，路遇北方家丁奚落刁难。

entries.text: In the bitter wind and rain, Northern Yao is cast out, wandering aimlessly in despair...
entries.zh_text: 凄风惨雨，北方曜被驱逐后失魂落魄，四处游荡……

entries.text: In the dim light of the secret chamber, strange noises persist. Dongfang Yao recalls the village taboo of "Unheard Sounds"...
entries.zh_text: 密室内烛灯幽幽，怪声不断，东方不曜回忆起“不闻诱音”的村中禁忌……

entries.text: Crows circle, Xiao Tian is elusive, and Dongfang Buyao is lost in thought...
entries.zh_text: 乌鸦盘旋，小天神出鬼没，东方不曜若有所思……

entries.text: Dongfang Buyao leaves the cell. Now that the wood carvings are collected, Xiao Tian has appeared again...
entries.zh_text: 东方不曜离开囚室，眼下木雕集齐，小天也再次出现……

entries.text: Dongfang Buyao breaks into the sealed cell, and what he sees makes his blood run cold...
entries.zh_text: 东方不曜闯入封禁囚室，眼前所见令其不寒而栗……

entries.text: In the book, Meng Shao is defeated and wants to seek help from the Three Sages with Sun Bing...
entries.zh_text: 书中，蒙少落败，欲与孙饼向三贤求助……

entries.text: In the book, a group of Jixia students outside the venue mimic Dongfang Yaotian's past defeat and hurl insults at him.
entries.zh_text: 书中，会场外一群稷下学生模仿东方曜天当年惨败的情境，并对东方曜天恶语相向。

entries.text: In the book, the two ox-headed guards make things difficult for Dongfang Yaotian, who has come to attend the meeting, and order thugs to drive him away.
entries.zh_text: 书中，牛马守卫二人，刁难前来赴会的东方曜天，命打手将其驱逐。

entries.text: In the book, Jixia celebrates the Dragon King Festival, and Dongfang Yaotian attends in a red robe.
entries.zh_text: 书中，稷下盛开龙王庆典，东方曜天着一袭红袍，翩然赴会。

entries.text: The mastermind appears, blocking your path and preparing to attack!
entries.zh_text: 幕后黑手登场，断了你们的去路，准备对你们大打出手！

entries.text: The author trapped in the cage is being humiliated and suffering. Dongfang Yao and you prepare to draw your swords to help...
entries.zh_text: 囚笼内被困作者受辱遭殃，东方曜与你准备拔剑相助……

entries.text: Lengchun opens her secret research room to you and helps you change your disguise here.
entries.zh_text: 冷春将自己的研究密室开放给你，并在这里帮你变装。

entries.text: Master had long sensed that some had infiltrated the academy to track Leng Chun, and he entrusted the task of "cleaning up" these individuals to her.
entries.zh_text: 夫子早就察觉到有些人为了追踪冷春而混入学院，他将“清理”这些人的任务交给了冷春。

entries.text: You and Guanfeng walk into the thick fog. He seems to have seen something strange ahead.
entries.zh_text: 你与观风一同走入浓雾。他似乎在前面看到了什么奇怪的东西。

entries.text: As you examine the fawn's remains, a strange sound echoes from the surroundings...
entries.zh_text: 检查小鹿尸体时，周围传来奇怪的声音……

entries.text: The two captured individuals refuse to speak, so Lengchun suggests using a potion to make them "talk nicely."
entries.zh_text: 被抓住的两人什么都不说，冷春便提议用魔药让他们“乖乖开口”。

entries.text: You meet Guanfeng again, who is out collecting wind, and learn from him that a group of people is blocking others from entering the school building under the guise of safety inspections.
entries.zh_text: 你们又遇到了采风的观风，从他那里得知有一伙人在以安全检查的名义阻拦他人进入校舍。

entries.text: You receive intermittent communications from Lengchun; she seems to have encountered an accident. You decide to follow and check on the situation.
entries.zh_text: 你接收到冷春断断续续的通信，她那里似乎遇到了意外。你决定还是跟上去看看情况。

entries.text: You find a Jixia map marked with many locations and speculate that the mastermind might be using the bats' characteristics to scan the area in order to find someone.
entries.zh_text: 你们找到一张标记着许多地点的稷下地图，推测幕后黑手可能在利用蝙蝠的特性排查区域，目的是寻找某人。

entries.text: You feel that Lengchun sent you here to gather more information, so you decide to ask other patients about the situation first.
entries.zh_text: 你觉得冷春把你送来这里，是为打探更多信息，因此决定先找其他患者问问情况。

entries.text: Lengchun takes you directly out of the Herb Garden to continue your investigation.
entries.zh_text: 冷春直接带着你离开了百草园，继续你们的调查。

entries.text: You're here~ Where should we start? I heard 'Morning Dao' is a great way to level up quickly. Want to check it out?
entries.zh_text: 你来啦~打算从哪里开始？听说朝闻道可以快速升级，去瞧瞧？

entries.text: I observed the stars last night~ and calculated that today is a good day for an upgrade. Want to go check out Zhaowen Dao?
entries.zh_text: 我昨晚夜观天象~算出来今天适合升级，去朝闻道看看吗？

entries.text: Need help? If you want to level up quickly, why not check out Zhaowendao~
entries.zh_text: 需要帮忙吗？想要快速升级的话，不妨去朝闻道看看~

entries.text: What a unique Flux. You might be able to break those purple <001>"Star-Fiends"</>.
entries.zh_text: 好特别的流，若是你说不定可击破那些紫色<001>“妖星”</>。
entries.official_target_text: What a unique Flux. You might be able to break those purple <001>妖星</>.
entries.official_en_text: What a unique Flux. You might be able to break those purple <001>妖星</>.

entries.text: Careful, get out of the fire quickly.
entries.zh_text: 小心，快从火里撤出来。

entries.text: Quick, go find someone to put out the fire.
entries.zh_text: 快，快去找人灭火。

entries.text: This fire came so suddenly, it's uncomfortable!
entries.zh_text: 这火来得好突然，令人难受！

entries.text: It's on fire, run!
entries.zh_text: 着火了，快跑。

entries.text: What's going on? Why is there a fire?
entries.zh_text: 怎么回事？怎么着火了？

entries.text: Why did a fire start suddenly?
entries.zh_text: 怎么突然起火了？

entries.text: I wish my cannon was that powerful too.
entries.zh_text: 要是我的火炮威力也能这么大就好了。

entries.text: I heard that a massive explosion can also put out a fire.
entries.zh_text: 我听说，剧烈的爆炸也能灭火。

entries.text: Burning, it's so spectacular!
entries.zh_text: 燃烧，太壮观了！

entries.text: Maybe I should invent a fire-extinguishing device...
entries.zh_text: 我是不是得研发个灭火机关……

entries.text: Get out of here, humans can't withstand heat like mechs.
entries.zh_text: 快离开这儿，人可没有机关抗热。

entries.text: A good opportunity to observe the flames.
entries.zh_text: 倒是个观测火焰的好机会。

entries.text: Who cast a fire-related magic art?
entries.zh_text: 是谁放了和火有关的魔道术吗？

entries.text: I recall there's a magic art specifically for extinguishing fires?
entries.zh_text: 我记得有招专门灭火的魔道术？

entries.text: What was it again?
entries.zh_text: 是什么来着？

entries.text: The energy in this fire doesn't look like it was produced by magic.
entries.zh_text: 这火中的能量不像魔道术产生的。

entries.text: Last match, I pushed the enemy's defense tower.
entries.zh_text: 上次比赛，我推了对面的防御塔。

entries.text: I participated in the tactical operation to destroy the crystal last month!
entries.zh_text: 我上个月参与了拆水晶的战术行动！

entries.text: Amazing!
entries.zh_text: 真厉害！

entries.text: So powerful!
entries.zh_text: 真威猛！

entries.text: The longer the match goes on, the less we're valued.
entries.zh_text: 比赛时间越长，我们就越不受重视。

entries.text: Exactly. I could hold my own at first, but later on, one hit and I was down.
entries.zh_text: 没错，一开始还能拉扯两下，后期一招我就躺下了。

entries.text: It's unfair. I wish there was gear we could wear too.
entries.zh_text: 不公平，要是有我们也能穿的装备就好了。

entries.text: Exactly. We should suggest that the Academy optimize the competition mechanics.
entries.zh_text: 太对了，得跟学院建议，优化一下比赛机制。

entries.text: Where were you when the enemy pushed to the high ground that day?
entries.zh_text: 那天对面打上高地的时候，你去哪儿了？

entries.text: I didn't see you when our crystal was destroyed the day before yesterday either.
entries.zh_text: 前天我们水晶被人推掉的时候我也没看见你。

entries.text: I've been finished off.
entries.zh_text: 我被人补了。

entries.text: I got finished off too.
entries.zh_text: 我也被人补了。

entries.text: The most important thing in war is making sure the soldiers are well-fed.
entries.zh_text: 战争中最重要的，是让士兵吃饱肚子。

entries.text: An empty stomach is a soldier's worst enemy.
entries.zh_text: 空腹，是士兵的大敌。

entries.text: It smells delicious, but unfortunately, I cannot eat.
entries.zh_text: 香气扑鼻，可惜我不能进食。

entries.text: Please select a resonance to ban!
entries.zh_text: 请选择禁用共鸣！

entries.text: We choose Resonance!
entries.zh_text: 我方选择共鸣！

entries.text: Aced.
entries.zh_text: 团灭。

entries.text: An ally has been slain.
entries.zh_text: 友方已被击败。

entries.text: An enemy has been slain.
entries.zh_text: 友方完成击败。

entries.text: Double Kill.
entries.zh_text: 二连击破。

entries.text: Enemy Double Kill.
entries.zh_text: 敌方二连击破。

entries.text: Enemy Godlike.
entries.zh_text: 敌方横扫千军。

entries.text: Enemy Killing Spree.
entries.zh_text: 敌方锐不可当。

entries.text: Enemy Legendary!
entries.zh_text: 敌方天下无双！

entries.text: Enemy Quadra Kill!
entries.zh_text: 敌方四连超凡！

entries.text: Enemy Rampage.
entries.zh_text: 敌方势如破竹。

entries.text: Enemy Triple Kill.
entries.zh_text: 敌方三连逐胜。

entries.text: Enemy Unstoppable.
entries.zh_text: 敌方所向披靡。

entries.text: An ally has fallen.
entries.zh_text: 有人倒下了。

entries.text: First Blood.
entries.zh_text: 先下一城。

entries.text: Sweeping Strike.
entries.zh_text: 横扫千军。

entries.text: Unstoppable.
entries.zh_text: 锐不可当。

entries.text: Legendary!
entries.zh_text: 天下无双！

entries.text: Quadra Kill!
entries.zh_text: 四连超凡！

entries.text: Rampage.
entries.zh_text: 势如破竹。

entries.text: Shutdown!
entries.zh_text: 终结！

entries.text: Triple Kill.
entries.zh_text: 三连逐胜。

entries.text: Unstoppable.
entries.zh_text: 所向披靡。

entries.text: You have been slain.
entries.zh_text: 你已被击败。

entries.text: Defeat completed.
entries.zh_text: 已完成击败。

entries.text: Sorry, my bad.
entries.zh_text: 抱歉，这波我的。

entries.text: Looking for an apprentice!
entries.zh_text: 收徒！

entries.text: Group up and push!
entries.zh_text: 集合，一波！

entries.text: Gather for a team fight.
entries.zh_text: 集合准备团战。

entries.text: Attack the enemy ranged units.
entries.zh_text: 攻击敌方远程。

entries.text: Watch out for flanks.
entries.zh_text: 注意敌方绕后。

entries.text: I'm here, don't be afraid.
entries.zh_text: 有我在，别害怕。

entries.text: Don't give up, we can still turn this around.
entries.zh_text: 别放弃，还能翻盘。

entries.text: Don't be reckless.
entries.zh_text: 别浪。

entries.text: Well played!
entries.zh_text: 干得漂亮！

entries.text: Follow me.
entries.zh_text: 跟着我。

entries.text: Give it your all!
entries.zh_text: 全力以赴!

entries.text: Our coordination is perfect!
entries.zh_text: 我们配合的很有默契！

entries.text: Understood.
entries.zh_text: 收到。

entries.text: Heh, nice play!
entries.zh_text: 呵呵，打的不错哟~

entries.text: Happy New Year!
entries.zh_text: 新年快乐！

entries.text: Hello!
entries.zh_text: 你好！

entries.text: Help me!
entries.zh_text: 救救我！

entries.text: Let's be friends.
entries.zh_text: 交个朋友。

entries.text: My bad, that was a mistake.
entries.zh_text: 失误了，我的。

entries.text: Let me initiate!
entries.zh_text: 等我先手！

entries.text: Need backup!
entries.zh_text: 请求支援！

entries.text: Skills on cooldown, retreating.
entries.zh_text: 技能不全，撤退。

entries.text: Protect our backline!
entries.zh_text: 保护我方远程！

entries.text: Chase the low-HP enemy.
entries.zh_text: 追击残血。

entries.text: I'm in bad shape, retreating!
entries.zh_text: 状态不好，撤退！

entries.text: Let's go, team! One final push!
entries.zh_text: 兄弟们，一波啦！

entries.text: Sorry.
entries.zh_text: 抱歉。

entries.text: Focus on the enemies.
entries.zh_text: 优先打人。

entries.text: Thanks!
entries.zh_text: 谢谢你！

entries.text: Everyone, turn on your mics.
entries.zh_text: 大家打开语音。

entries.text: Ultimate is ready.
entries.zh_text: 大招已就绪。

entries.text: Unity is strength.
entries.zh_text: 团结就是力量。

entries.text: Don't fight, wait for the team.
entries.zh_text: 别团，等人齐。

entries.text: Wait for me to group up for a team fight.
entries.zh_text: 等我集合打团。

entries.text: Wait for me, I'll be there soon!
entries.zh_text: 等等我，马上到！

entries.text: The heroes fight alongside you, clearing the obstacles ahead and escorting you to Di Xin. However, despite your best efforts, you fail to stop him. The world crumbles in his hands, and the Primordial Priest blocks a fatal blow for you, sending you away from this world.
entries.zh_text: 众英雄与你一同迎战，他们为你扫除了前路障碍，将你护送到了帝辛面前，但你们竭尽全力还是未能阻止帝辛，世界在祂的手中分崩离析，原初神职者为你挡下了致命一击，将你送离了这个世界。

entries.text: On the battlefield of ruin, heroes stand with you to launch a fierce assault against the powerful enemy.
entries.zh_text: 毁灭的战场之上，众英雄与你共进退，面对力量强大的敌人发起猛攻。

entries.text: Everything began with the War of God's Fall. Nuwa and Dijun clashed over the Miracle, leading to the fall of all gods. Before she vanished, Nuwa left behind prophecies and hopes for the future.
entries.zh_text: 一切都始于神陨之战，女娲与帝俊因奇迹而起纷争，最终神明尽皆陨落，女娲为后人留下了对未来的预言与期待。

entries.text: The heroes fight alongside you, but one by one they fall before the overwhelming power. They cleared the path for you and escorted you to Di Xin; you now face him carrying their will.
entries.zh_text: 众英雄与你一同迎战，最终一个个在强大的力量前倒下，他们为你扫除了前路障碍，将你护送到了帝辛面前，你带着他们的意志前来迎战帝辛。

entries.text: You failed to stop Di Xin, and the world crumbled in his hands. The Primordial Priest blocked a fatal blow for you and sent you away from this world. As you parted, she gently said that this would not be the end of everything.
entries.zh_text: 你们竭尽全力还是未能阻止帝辛，世界在祂的手中分崩离析，原初神职者为你挡下了致命一击后，将你送离了这个世界，而离别之时，她温柔道，这并不会是一切的结束。

entries.text: The Primal Priest blocks a fatal blow for you. You join forces to fight Di Xin, but he unleashes a world-ending power at that very moment.
entries.zh_text: 原初神职者为你挡下致命一击，你们合力对抗帝辛，但帝辛却在此时发动了灭世之力。

entries.text: I am the captain in the Dream of Return. It is only reasonable that I be the captain for a mere Fish-Seeking Pendant event.
entries.zh_text: 归虚梦演里我就是队长，区区一个寻鱼佩活动，由我来当队长合情合理吧。

entries.text: When it comes to brains and speed, I'm confident I won't lose to anyone.
entries.zh_text: 论头脑和速度，我可有信心不会输给任何人。

entries.text: Besides, this puzzle event is taking place in Fengyun Wilds. The people at the market stalls might be the organizers. To get them to talk, gentle persuasion won't be enough.
entries.zh_text: 而且这次解谜活动在丰云野进行，周围集市摊位的人说不定都是主办方，要把他们的嘴撬开，仅靠温和的沟通是不够的。

entries.text: A mix of kindness and severity yields the best results.
entries.zh_text: 恩威并施才能得到最好的结果。

entries.text: So, even if my opponent is the gentle Senior Xi Shi, I am confident in my victory.
entries.zh_text: 所以说，就算竞选对手是温柔的西施学姐，我也信心在握。

entries.text: Well? Are you still hesitating?
entries.zh_text: 怎么样？你还要犹豫吗？

entries.text: Well, having to choose between me and Senior Xi Shi, it's understandable that you'd hesitate. Why don't you go talk to her again?
entries.zh_text: 毕竟是在我和西施学姐之间选择，稍有犹豫也不是不能理解。那你再去和西施学姐聊聊？

entries.text: There's not much time, no need to hesitate. If you come to me again, I'll assume you support me!
entries.zh_text: 时间不多，没什么好犹豫的，你要是再来找我，我可就默认你支持我了啊！

entries.text: What do you know? Sometimes, an arrow nocked on a bow is more dangerous than one actually fired.
entries.zh_text: 你懂什么，有时候，搭在弓上的箭会比真正射出的要更危险。

entries.text: The Star Team cheers you on as you prepare for the Tower Climbing Challenge.
entries.zh_text: 星之队的大家一起为即将参加攀塔挑战的你加油。

entries.text: You are pushed into the depths of the dream. As you lose consciousness, a mysterious voice wakes you. Following the calls of your companions in your memory, you grab the Star Team badge and successfully wake up from the dream.
entries.zh_text: 你被推入梦境深处，在你失去意识之际，有神秘的声音将你从梦中唤醒，跟随记忆中同伴们的呼唤，你抓住了星之队徽章，成功从梦中醒来。

entries.text: The man in black shows you the end of the world's destruction and claims that only he can help you escape this fated ruin. To make you believe you cannot fight fate, he recreates the end of the world, and the nightmare you cannot defeat emerges before your eyes.
entries.zh_text: 黑衣人向你展示了世界被毁灭的结局，并称只有他能够带你逃离这命定的毁灭，为了让你相信你无法对抗命运，他重现了世界毁灭的结局，你无论如何都无法战胜的梦魇浮现眼前。

entries.text: Just when you think it's all over, the man in black reappears. He is curious about where your determination comes from—is it the Star Team? But this struggle is meaningless; you will only drag them all into eternal doom. He strips the Star Team's flow from your bracelet, and the nightmare you just defeated absorbs it, reborn before your eyes.
entries.zh_text: 就在你以为一切已经结束时，黑衣人再度出现，他好奇你的决心从何而来，是星之队吗？可这挣扎毫无意义，你只会将他们都拖入万劫不复。他将你手环中星之队的流剥离而出，方才被战胜的梦魇汲取后，再次复生于你面前。

entries.text: You struggle in despair, but the Star Team's 'Flow' is touched by you, affecting the Nightmare and creating a opening for you. You reclaim the Star Team's 'Flow' with all your might, and with their help, you are about to defeat the Nightmare. The man in black is moved by your persistence and lets you consider whether to join him before pushing you out of the final layer of the dream.
entries.zh_text: 你在绝境中挣扎，星之队的流因你而触动，影响了梦魇，为你争取了一丝破绽。你竭尽全力夺回了星之队的流，在他们的帮助下竟即将战胜梦魇，黑衣人为你的执着所动，让你考虑下是否要加入他，就将你推出了最后一重梦境。

entries.text: A few days later, Xin Ye returns pale with the main gear, truly restoring the grandfather clock to operation. Shiyu's master gives him the position of shopkeeper. But unexpectedly, this was the last time Shiyu and Xin Ye would ever see each other.
entries.zh_text: 几天后，辛夜面色苍白的带着主齿轮回来，真的让大摆钟恢复了运行，时煜的师父将店长之位给了他。但没想到，这竟然是时煜和辛夜的最后一面。

entries.text: The rescued student obediently accepts Sun Bin's safety education and agrees to go to the Student Affairs Committee to accept punishment.
entries.zh_text: 被救下的学子老老实实接受了孙膑的安全教育，答应会去学事委接受处罚。

entries.text: Worried that you wouldn't be able to handle the eccentric Master Shiyu, Sun Bin rushed over as soon as he finished his tasks, working with you to crack the mechanisms in the room.
entries.zh_text: 担心你无法应对脾气古怪的时煜师傅，孙膑处理完手中事务便立刻赶了过来，与你合力破解了屋中设置的机关。

entries.text: You reach the top and see Sun Bin's Time-Energy Mechanism Core. It seems all the energy of the Observatory is converging here, and you prepare to take it.
entries.zh_text: 你来到顶端，看到孙膑的时能机关核，似乎整个观星台的能量都在向这里汇聚，你们准备取下它。

entries.text: Stepping into the force field, Ou Yezi truly returns to her former beautiful self. Then Shiyu arrives, steps onto the stairs formed by the energy dial, and gradually returns to his younger appearance. The two finally see each other, looking at one another with teary eyes. Sun Bin also gives his all, using the most precious energy in his pocket watch to ensure this reunion is successful.
entries.zh_text: 踏入力场的欧叶子，竟真的变回了昔日的美丽少女，随后时煜到来，踏上了能量表盘构成的阶梯，一步步变回年轻的摸样，两人终于见到彼此，泪眼相望。孙膑也拼尽全力，用上怀表中最珍贵的能量来让这场相聚顺利完成。

entries.text: Sun Bin tells you that he was distracted because this is a fragment of the Space-Time Gate, which is how Tian Ji went missing.
entries.zh_text: 孙膑告诉你自己之所以出神，是因为这是时空之门的碎片，田忌就是因此失踪的。

entries.text: Sun Bin says this is where he rescues kittens and invites you to help him find the one that is hiding.
entries.zh_text: 孙膑说这里是他救助小猫的地方，并邀请你一同救助，和他一起找找那只躲起来的小猫吧。

entries.text: Follow Meow-Shuai to find the cat hiding on the roof. Go and bring it down.
entries.zh_text: 跟着喵帅，你们在屋顶上发现那只躲起来的猫，去把它抱下来吧。

entries.text: While recounting the story of healing a kitten, Sun Bin recalls the experience of stepping out from the shadow of losing his legs. After you agree to adopt the kitten, he suggests taking a group photo of the cats.
entries.zh_text: 孙膑讲述为小猫疗伤的往事时，回想起走出失去双腿阴影的经历。你同意认养小猫后，他提议拍张猫咪们的合影。

entries.text: Sun Bin introduces you to the cats adopted by Meng Ya, Xi Shi, and Lu Ban.
entries.zh_text: 孙膑向你介绍了蒙犽、西施和鲁班领养的猫咪。

entries.text: Effect: Continuously restores <Gold_Basic>1200</> HP over <Gold_Basic>15</> seconds; resonance (off-field) restores <Gold_Basic>1000</> HP.
entries.zh_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>1200</>点生命值，后台共鸣恢复<Gold_Basic>1000</>点生命值。
entries.source_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>1200</>点生命值，后台共鸣恢复<Gold_Basic>1000</>点生命值。

entries.text: Effect: Increases Attack by <Gold_Basic>70</> for <Gold_Basic>20</> minutes.
entries.zh_text: 效果：攻击力提升<Gold_Basic>70</>点，持续<Gold_Basic>20</>分钟。
entries.source_text: 效果：攻击力提升<Gold_Basic>70</>点，持续<Gold_Basic>20</>分钟。

entries.text: Effect: Continuously restores <Gold_Basic>26%</> HP over <Gold_Basic>15</> seconds; resonance (off-field) restores <Gold_Basic>22%</> HP.
entries.zh_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>26%</>生命值，后台共鸣恢复<Gold_Basic>22%</>生命值。

entries.zh_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>50%</>生命值，并降低<Gold_Basic>80%</>受到的贯元素伤害，持续<Gold_Basic>10</>秒。
entries.source_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>50%</>生命值，并降低<Gold_Basic>80%</>受到的贯元素伤害，持续<Gold_Basic>10</>秒。

entries.text: Effect: Instantly restores <Gold_Basic>12.5%</> HP, plus an additional <Gold_Basic>1750</> HP.
entries.zh_text: 药效：即刻恢复<Gold_Basic>12.5%</>生命值，并额外恢复<Gold_Basic>1750</>点生命值。
entries.source_text: 药效：即刻恢复<Gold_Basic>12.5%</>生命值，并额外恢复<Gold_Basic>1750</>点生命值。

entries.text: Effect: Continuously restores <Gold_Basic>1500</> HP over <Gold_Basic>15</> seconds; instantly restores <Gold_Basic>750</> HP to the protagonist.
entries.zh_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>1500</>点生命值，立即恢复<Gold_Basic>750</>点主角生命值。
entries.source_text: 药效：在<Gold_Basic>15</>秒内，持续恢复<Gold_Basic>1500</>点生命值，立即恢复<Gold_Basic>750</>点主角生命值。

entries.text: Madness is the only way to stay young. Tonight, we remain forever young alongside the night. (Duration: 1 day)
entries.zh_text: 不疯不成萝，此刻的我们，与夜色一同永远年轻。（有效期：1日）
